docs-only.note: Docs-only changes should stay quiet. Zero prompt reduction is acceptable when the diff is already small.

runtime-package.note: Runtime/package changes should route through config-aware agents and show measurable slicing.

auth-guard.note: Auth changes can stay unsliced when the diff is small, but routing and risk escalation must stay sharp.

api-mutation.note: Mutation scenarios should route through API, integration, and cache agents even without slicing.

release-relocation.note: Large release-style diffs should show strong deterministic slicing before any LLM call.

mirrored-tests.note: Mirrored src-to-tests layouts should still produce related test matches across tests/ and __tests__ roots.
